CustomField.description: Marker for B6 (Phase B contact-point seed) records. TRUE means this ContactPointEmail was generated by FscContactPointSeed from the parent Person Account or Contact's existing email. Idempotency gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscContactPointSeed. TRUE means this is generated demo data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Contact Point
